hooks.prompt:
A pull request was just created. Get the PR number by running: gh pr view --json number --jq '.number'

Run: git diff main...HEAD --name-only to list all changed files on this branch.

If ANY files are inside the `frontend/` directory, act as the ui-tester agent and run all frontend tests:
1. cd frontend && npm run test:run
2. cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
3. cd frontend && npx playwright test

If any tests fail, post a comment on the PR with the failures: gh pr comment <number> --body "## UI Tester Report\n<findings>"

If all tests pass, exit silently. If no frontend/ files changed, exit silently.

A pull request was just created. Get the PR number by running: gh pr view --json number --jq '.number'

Run: git diff main...HEAD --name-only to list all changed files on this branch.

If ALL changed files are inside `frontend/` or `.github/`, exit silently — frontend changes are handled by the UI Tester.

Otherwise (any backend, .claude config, Go code, or other non-frontend changes exist), act as the lead-engineer agent:
1. For any changed Go module directories: cd <module> && go vet ./... && go test -race ./...
2. Run gofumpt on any changed .go files
3. Review git diff main...HEAD against CLAUDE.md rules — flag over-engineering, scope creep, missing tests, or violations

If any issues are found, post a comment on the PR: gh pr comment <number> --body "## Lead Engineer Review\n<findings>"

If everything passes, exit silently.
